summary: Adjusted the chapter's entry and exit seams to better match the boundary context: reconnected Gavin's opening position to the blocked outer corridor from chapter 16, clarified how he gets back into the castle, and shifted the dawn handoff so chapter 18 can reopen with Gavin back in the sub-collection and still working from a partial insight rather than a clean breakthrough.
edits: Linked the opening paragraph to the prior chapter's blocked-corridor setup by placing Gavin deeper in the sub-collection.
Clarified that the outer-corridor blockage has shifted enough for Gavin to leave, smoothing the transition from chapter 16.
Softened the ending's ward-coupling discovery into a partial foothold so the next chapter can reopen on unresolved work.
Returned Gavin to the sub-collection at dawn with the manuscript on his knees to align the handoff into chapter 18.
